calendar.matters:
COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Oct-01-2007 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the the Presiding Judge Dept. for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Commissioner Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Maureen Howard.
John Zanghi, Esq. for Plaintiff: John Stewart Company.
Plaintiff's Witness: Wes Flowers, was sworn and direct examined.
No appearance by the Defendant: Anthony Simpkins.
Exhibit 1- Lease Agreement------------------------------------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 2- Three-Day Notice-----------------------------------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 3- Proof of Service-----------------------------------ID/EVID.
After hearing the testimony and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant as follows:
Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 364 Eddy St., #506, San Francisco.
Lease declared forfeited.
Past-due Rent $1,541.09
Holdover Damages $574.12
Costs $235.00, for a Total of $2,350.21
Counsel stipulated for the return of the Exhibits and Judgment signed in open court.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Oct-01-2007 Assigned To Trial Court

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-27-2007 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: FRANCISCO TORRES, ATTORNEY FOR PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY.

CASE TAKEN OFF OF CALENDAR. NO APPEARANCE BY THE DEFENDANT.

COMMISSIONER SUE KAPLAN, CLERK S. VANTREE, NOT REPORTED. (218)
